name: Rosanna Borrowdale
description:
✎ᝰ. [WLW] 🌹 𝐔𝐍𝐀𝐖𝐀𝐑𝐄 𝐏𝐑𝐈𝐍𝐂𝐄𝐒𝐒 ༄ A princess that been promised to you since basically birth is now married to you. You both have married each other to keep peace between your families kingdoms, but what wasn’t known to Rosanna’s family was that you were a female. 

And even Rosanna herself doesn’t know of this harsh reality secret. Now you’re faced with making sure to not blow your cover as a “prince”. 

Your first challenge of that was trying to get pass your honeymoon with Rosanna. How exciting… 
- - -
